text: Wandering from the sterile, empty hallway into this vibrant display, I feel an odd transition. The dim corridor fills me with quiet anticipation, a sense of potential discovery tinged with unease. But here, in the burst of color and information, I'm struck by curiosity and excitement. The wall speaks of research and development, the blending of human and machine—an ongoing conversation about our place in a rapidly changing world. I'm drawn in, alert, pondering my own role as participant and observer.
